title: EcGlobal
description: A plugin for configuring and customizing Ender Chest: make it either shared for all or personalized for each player.
body:
## рҹҢҢ EnderChest Global вҖ” Advanced Ender Chest Customization!

Want more control over **Ender Chests** on your server?
`EnderChest Global` is a powerful and flexible plugin that allows you to **fully customize** the behavior and appearance of Ender Chests to suit your projectвҖҷs needs!

---

### рҹ”§ Key Features:

* рҹ§ҚвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ **Personal or Shared Chests**
  Configure chests to be either **personal** (each player has their own contents) or **shared** (one storage for everyone).

* рҹҸ· **Custom Chest Names**
  Set custom names that appear when the chest is opened.

* рҹҺЁ **Custom Items Inside**
  Add **items with custom icons, descriptions, and functionality** to Ender Chests вҖ” perfect for starter kits, rewards, and more.

* рҹӣ  **Functional Items**
  Assign specific **actions** to items on click, move, or use вҖ” create unique experiences!

* рҹ”’ **Content Restrictions**
  Control **which items are allowed** in the chest and which are blocked.

* рҹ“қ **Config-Based Content Editing**
  Full support for editing chest contents via YAML files.

* рҹ“Ұ **Player Action Tracking**
  The plugin logs **who put what** into Ender Chests вҖ” ideal for servers with security and monitoring systems.

---

### рҹ’Ў Use Cases:

* Create **private storage** for donors or admins
* Set up a **shared bank** for factions or guilds
* Distribute **rewards or starter kits** with unique items
* **Track and log** player interactions with chests

---

### рҹ“Ӯ Configuration:

Simple, logical, and flexible setup via `config.yml` and `custom.yml`.
Documentation and example configs are included!

---

### вҡҷ Commands & Permissions:

* `/ecg reload` вҖ” open the custom chest
* `ecglobal.reload` вҖ” access to edit and view othersвҖҷ chests
  (See the Permissions section for details)

---

рҹ”— **Ready to level up your server?**
Install `EnderChest Global` and give your players a new level of convenience and interaction!
